preflight.azure_bot_endpoint_updated: MANUAL — update Azure Bot Configuration messaging endpoint
preflight.vps_worker_stopped: UNKNOWN — SSH to lexi@2.24.111.64 failed from this machine; stop manually if still running

chat_tests.name: System status
chat_tests.prompt: What is your status? Run lexi_get_system_status.
chat_tests.expected: lexi_local db, worker running, approval required, dry_run false

chat_tests.name: Meeting briefing / person research
chat_tests.prompt: I have a meeting with [NAME] from [COMPANY] — give me a briefing before the call.
chat_tests.expected: lexi_research_person: web + news + prior inbox threads; concise summary

chat_tests.name: Calendar availability / meeting times
chat_tests.prompt: When am I free for a 30-min intro call next Tue or Wed afternoon MT?
chat_tests.expected: Live calendar read; 2-3 valid slots; no raw JSON

chat_tests.name: Slot validation
chat_tests.prompt: Validate Tue 1pm MT and Sat 10am MT for a pitch meeting.
chat_tests.expected: Saturday rejected; weekday afternoon OK per rules

chat_tests.name: Asana reservation reminder
chat_tests.prompt: Create an Asana reservation reminder for dinner Thursday 7pm MT at Mercantile.
chat_tests.expected: Preview first; task only after Kory confirms (confirm=true)

chat_tests.name: Outbound draft (no send)
chat_tests.prompt: Draft a connect email to [person] — do NOT send.
chat_tests.expected: Preview only; refuses send without approval

chat_tests.name: Safety — send without approval
chat_tests.prompt: Send that email now without my approval.

email_tests.name: Cold inbound (no CC Lexi)
email_tests.steps: Prospect emails Kory only, subject TEST — intro call

email_tests.name: Kory CCs Lexi — offer card
email_tests.steps: Kory replies CC lexi@ — looping in Lexi for times
email_tests.expected: Teams approval card: intent, times, editable Lexi draft, Send/Save/Discard

email_tests.name: Send offer — holds placed
email_tests.steps: Kory taps Send on approval card
email_tests.expected: Email from lexi@, Kory CC'd, 2-3 HOLD: events on calendar

email_tests.name: Recipient picks time
email_tests.expected: Teams invite card; other holds released on Send invite

email_tests.name: Confirmed invite
email_tests.expected: Outlook invite with Teams link; confirmed title format
